patch.value: pm schema remove-type: delete a custom type from types.json
add-type is idempotent upsert but there is no deletion path; renamed/abandoned types linger in types.json forever with no CLI removal.
pm schema remove-type <Name> removes the definition (case-insensitive); refuses built-ins; warns (not blocks) if open items of that type exist; lock-guarded; tests; MCP action.
add-type is idempotent upsert but there is no deletion path; renamed/abandoned types linger in types.json forever with no CLI removal.
